strategic_memory.pattern: Information-seeking — answer with one price band and one scope boundary, not a deck.
Objection-class reply — use capped pilot and single KPI to derisk price pushback.
Positive reply signal — anchor next message on calendar slot + written pilot cap.
Simulated send — wire Resend for real reply signal; do not scale on mock IDs alone.
